title: Charred Crispy Date-Night Filipino Bilo-Bilo Ginataang Bilo-Bilo
description: A date-night Filipino dish featuring charred and crispy bilo-bilo served in scallop shells with a flavorful ginataang sauce. The vanilla extract and cure add a unique twist to this traditional Filipino dessert.

ingredients.name: Ginataang sauce (coconut milk, sugar, ginger, garlic)

instructions: Prepare the bilo-bilo by rinsing them in water and pat dry with paper towels.
In a baking sheet, arrange the bilo-bilo in a single layer and drizzle with coconut oil.
Roast the bilo-bilo in the oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly charred.
While the bilo-bilo is roasting, prepare the ginataang sauce by heating the coconut milk in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the saucepan and stir until fragrant.
Add the brown sugar, curing salt, and vanilla extract to the saucepan and stir until dissolved.
Bring the ginataang sauce to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until thickened.
To assemble the dish, place a roasted bilo-bilo in each scallop shell, then spoon the ginataang sauce over the bilo-bilo.
Top with a scoop of ice cream or whipped cream, if desired.
Garnish with fresh fruit and coconut flakes, if desired.
Refrigerate the assembled dish for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional coconut flakes if desired.
